Strictly Private & Confidential — MNPI — Embargo until 2026-07-15 17:00 AST (Riyadh) — Project Palm Dune
To: Board of Al-Nour Logistics JSC (CR 7012345678); From: Dunes Capital Advisory LLC (Legal & Compliance); Contact: laila.alhazmi@dunescap.example.sa; cc: compliance@alnourlogistics.example.sa
Subject: Definitive Share Purchase Agreement to acquire 35% of Riyadh Oasis Foods JSC (CR 7039876543) for SAR 420,000,000 plus a 15% earn‑out tied to FY2027 EBITDA
Non-public: Term Sheet initialed 2026-06-28; SPA in near-final form; signing penciled for 2026-07-14; closing targeted 2026-08-10 subject to Kingdom Market Authority (KMA) no‑objection and REX issuer workflow clearance
MAE/MAC: CP requires no material adverse effect between signing and closing; for certainty, routine employee wellness/spa-day initiatives and previously disclosed depot maintenance are not MAE
PDPL compliance: processing of personal data (including employee names, work emails, and Iqama numbers) must follow the Kingdom PDPL; example record for diligence: Mr. Sami Al‑Rasheed, Iqama 2097765432, procurement manager at Riyadh Oasis Foods JSC
Cross-border transfer: any data export to our UAE diligence vendor requires SDAI‑K permit and contractual SCC‑equivalents; no SDAI‑K transfer shall occur before the embargo date
Systems controls: mask and tokenize any national IDs at source; only hashed values may leave KSA test environments; delete all copies within 30 days post‑closing
Financing: bridge facility of SAR 210,000,000 arranged with Desert Gate Bank PJSC; remainder from internal cash; interest cap at 6.25%; no covenants trigger at pro forma net debt/EBITDA 1.4x
IR drafting note: a pre‑cleared investor‑relations Q&A and holding slide deck are prepared but must not be posted before the embargo; draft statement references “Project Palm Dune” only
Public-source reference: as disclosed on riyadhoasis.example.sa/ir in 2024, the target’s warehousing footprint expanded by 12% (stale), which is not in itself price‑sensitive
todo: update the dataroom index, cross‑link to the public 2024 sustainability report, and move the vendor DD pack to folder 03_financials_final
Governance: Board Chair H.E. Mr. Faisal Al‑Qamar to approve delegation for signatories and issue a certificate of non‑public status for KMA filing; no media engagement is authorized
Sanctions/ABAC: confirm no listed persons or jurisdictions in vendor roll; whistleblowing hotline: ethics@alnourlogistics.example.sa; inquiries to Dr. Laila Al‑Hazmi at +966‑510‑000‑123 (internal line)
